track: A3 — universe-scale calibration + robustness sweeps (CACHED PATH ONLY)

data_sources_cached_only.universe_pooled: data/interim/base_predictor_preds.parquet (33983 rows, 11526 genes, gene-level train/calib/test folds)
data_sources_cached_only.reproducible_core: data/gold/conformal_lodo_receipt.json (donor-blocked LODO, 2591 core genes, per-donor coverage) — REUSED, h5mu NOT re-streamed

method.conformal: split-conformal absolute-residual; nonconformity=|y-pred|; q_L=quantile(|r_calib|, L, method='higher'); coverage_L = mean(|r_test|<=q_L)
method.fit: base predictor fit on TRAIN genes only (cached); calib fold -> quantile; test fold -> coverage. Gene-level folds => leakage-clean (disjoint gene sets).

robustness_sweeps_preregistered.1_across_donors: leave-each-donor-out coverage from cached LODO receipt (4 held-out donors); report mean+-sd and worst-case per level
robustness_sweeps_preregistered.2_across_gene_subsets_bins: universe test rows stratified by: condition(3), target_baseMean quartiles, trans_effect_magnitude(y) quartiles, n_cells quartiles; conditional coverage per stratum per level
robustness_sweeps_preregistered.3_across_conformal_seed: re-partition pooled (calib+test) GENES into calib/test at each of 20 seeds (gene-level to preserve leakage structure), recompute coverage; report mean+-sd across seeds

verdict_rule_prereg.robust_if: worst-case per-stratum coverage within 0.03 (abs) of nominal at 0.90 across ALL sweeps AND seed-sweep sd<0.01
verdict_rule_prereg.mostly_if: worst-case within 0.05 of nominal but one or more strata deviate 0.03-0.05
verdict_rule_prereg.not_robust_if: any stratum deviates > 0.05 (abs) from nominal at 0.90
verdict_rule_prereg.note: reported HONESTLY either way; deviations named explicitly, no post-hoc tuning
